templates.name: How can I change/edit/cancel Subscription?
templates.content:
You may modify your subscription anytime by logging in at https://www.mykitsch.com/?externalId=apUZC#rivo.

Once there, enter the email address associated with your subscription. You should receive a 4-digit code delivered to that email address that will act as a one-time password for your account. After you've logged in, select "Manage Subscription". This will direct you to your subscription portal, where you have the power to control your Kitsch subscription details, including changing the items, moving up your delivery date, or canceling your subscription.

templates.name: Is there a limit to the reward points I can use?
templates.content: The best coupon you can use your points for is a $20 discount using 2,000 points.

templates.name: What type of packaging do you use?
templates.content: We don't use plastic for packaging, as we only use wax-coated paper.

templates.name: Difference between the heatless hair curlers in satin and the heatless rollers
templates.content: The size is the only difference between these two, but the use is the same. They both work on all types of hair, and it comes down to your personal preference. The Heatless Curling Rollers are more suitable for short hair.

templates.name: Any recommendations for psoriasis?
templates.content: While we appreciate the interest in our products, it's important to note that eczema and psoriasis are medical conditions. Kitsch is not qualified to give medical advice for the treatment of these conditions. We recommend consulting with a healthcare provider for diagnosis and treatment options tailored to your needs.

templates.name: Are your shampoo bars ph balanced?
templates.content: Most shampoo bars use a higher pH level, contain sulfates, or use silicon to mimic the effects of liquid shampoo. All of which can severely dry and damage your hair. Kitsch is carefully balanced and doesn't contain sulfates or silicone so your hair can retain its moisture and allow the rice water protein to work its hair-growth magic.

templates.name: Do the microfibers towel need to be hand washed?
templates.content: The Microfiber Hair Towels don't necessarily need to be hand-washed.

templates.name: Do the pillowcases in the 4-pack come individually packaged?
templates.content: Pillowcases are packed in their individual boxes.

templates.name: Castor oil contains toxins that are harmful to human health. If it's included in your hair products, how can I be assured that it is free from these toxins?
templates.content: Castor oil is actually derived from a plant, which is castor beans. Our bars are free from sulfates, phthalates, and parabens. To learn more about the ingredients in our bars, please visit: https://mykitsch.attn.tv/sl/X8lQTk4g

templates.name: How long do your Shampoo and Conditioner bars typically last with 2-3 times a week washing?
templates.content: We estimate each bar covers about two 16oz plastic bottles. Exactly how long your bars will last depends on a variety of factors, including how often you wash your hair and your hair length & texture, and how much product is used for each wash. We suggest getting the mesh lather bags to help preserve the life of your bars: https://www.mykitsch.com/pages/search?q=mesh%20lather%20bags

templates.name: Is the rice shampoo or the castor oil better for thin/ fine hair & promoting new growth?
templates.content: If you have porous, protein-sensitive, or chemically treated hair (such as colored hair), you might want to limit the use of Rice Water Shampoo and Conditioner. In such cases, the hair is more porous and prone to protein overload, which could make your hair feel brittle, dry, or heavy. For daily care, you might consider trying our Castor Oil Shampoo and Coconut Oil Conditioner, which are formulated to be gentle and nourishing.

templates.name: How do you source your rice ingredients?
templates.content: We buy a cosmetic-grade hydrolyzed rice protein ingredient from a USA supplier for our formulas. We are not the manufacturer of the ingredient.

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://mykitsch.com/pages/order-tracking/

templates.name: Payment methods
templates.content: We offer payments via credit cards, AfterPay and PayPal.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://mykitsch.loopreturns.com/#/

templates.name: Rewards / referral program
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://mykitsch.com/pages/kitsch-rewards

templates.name: Do all your pillowcases have zippers?
templates.content: Yes, all of our pillowcases have zippers.

templates.name: Is your shower cap mildew resistant?
templates.content: It's not treated with anything specific to be mildew resistant and we suggest making sure to air out thoroughly after use.

templates.name: Material composition of the towel scrunchies
templates.content: It's made up of 85% biconstituent fiber and 15% polyester.

templates.name: Material composition of the dinner scrunchie
templates.content: It's made of 95% polyester plus 5% elastics (2.5% rubber and 2.5% polyester).

templates.name: What's the outside material for your shower caps?
templates.content: They're recycled PET.

templates.name: How to keep the silk pillowcase clean
templates.content: We suggest you hand wash them with warm water and gentle detergent, then lay flat to dry.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 2 business days and we usually ship via FedEx and DHL. Once shipped it will take 3-5 business days for domestic orders and 2 weeks for international orders.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at kitsch@mykitsch.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Do your masks have a metal piece on the nose to pinch down?
templates.content: There are no metal pieces in the nose area of our masks.

templates.name: Do your headbands come tied?
templates.content: Our headbands come untied.

templates.name: What kind of serum should be used with Micro Derma Facial Roller?
templates.content: We recommend using a Vitamin C serum or your other favorite skincare products after using the Micro Derma Facial Roller.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.mykitsch.com/pages/shipping-and-returns

templates.name: Why does my product have a weird smell / scent?
templates.content: Some items may have an odor from the manufacturing process. If airing them out has not helped, we would suggest a return.

templates.name: To help with your decision
templates.content: To help with your decision today, check out our rewards page and earn points for every purchase: https://mykitsch.com/pages/kitsch-rewards

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: The best way to inquire about our major retailers is to email us directly at sales@mykitsch.com. Our team is happy to help.

templates.name: How do I redeem my points and get my discount?
templates.content: All you need to do is log in to your account here: https://www.mykitsch.com/account/login?return_url=%2Faccount Then select the rewards link at the bottom of the page to redeem your points for the discount. Let me know how that goes!

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: All of our items are designed and shipped from Los Angeles, however, our products themselves are manufactured overseas. We produce with the strictest of guidelines, perform routine audits, and have amazing relationships with our factories. We are a woman-owned and operated company proud to support many here in the USA.

templates.name: Are your shampoo bars safe for color treated hair?
templates.content: Yes, all our shampoo bars are safe to use on colored hair.

templates.name: I can't login and there's no email to reset my password
templates.content: It sounds like your original order was placed via our guest checkout. In order to activate your account please select the "sign up" option on the login page and create an account with the same email used on your original order. Once the account is activated, you'll be able to view all the info related to any orders associated with your email.

templates.name: Are your shower caps microfiber-lined?
templates.content: No, they're not, they're just recycled PET.

templates.name: Are your pillowcases vegan? Material composition
templates.content: They are 100% vegan satin polyester.

templates.name: Are your Heatless Pillow Rollers & Heatless Curling Set both good for shoulder/short length hair?
templates.content: They both work great on shorter or shoulder length hair. For a more blowout look, we suggest the single heatless curler, and for a more traditional curl, we suggest the 6 piece set.

templates.name: Hair quiz
templates.content: I'd suggest taking our Hair Quiz in order to find your perfect hair routine: https://mykitsch.attn.tv/sl/3JAfOmbn

templates.name: Are your shampoos and conditioners safe for pregnant women?
templates.content: Yes, our shampoos and conditioners are safe for pregnant women. However, it's always good to patch-test or consult your doctor if you have allergies or health-specific questions.

templates.name: Did the nourishing shampoo bar change formula/packaging?
templates.content: We changed the packaging and color, plus we tweaked the scent strength based on feedback.

templates.content: If you're interested in making a wholesale order, you can sign up here to get started - https://mykitsch.com/pages/wholesale You can also contact us directly at sales@mykitsch.com for other wholesale inquiries. Our team is happy to chat!

templates.name: Is return shipping free?
templates.content: Yes, we offer free returns.

templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can learn more and apply for our ambassador program here - https://ambassador.mykitsch.com/login For sponsorship inquiries, please email us directly at kitsch@mykitsch.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.content: The shower caps are 66% recycled PET and 34% PU.

templates.name: I received one pillowcase instead of two for the Satin Sleep Set
templates.content: Since you ordered the satin sleep set, it's just 1 pillowcase. You can see what's included in the sleep set here: https://mykitsch.com/products/satin-sleep-set-blush The receipt says 2 pillowcases because of the scripts that Shopify runs on the order at checkout. The $36 dollar set only comes with one pillowcase. We do have a 2 pillowcase bundle for $46 here: https://mykitsch.com/products/king-pillowcase-ivory

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content:
I'm afraid we're unable to alter or add/remove items from an order after it has been placed. If you need to make any changes to your order, we recommend canceling and placing a new order so long as it is still eligible. You can cancel your order by logging into your account and looking under your order history. You can log into your account here: https://www.mykitsch.com/#status

Our team is working tirelessly to ship orders as fast as possible, so apologies in advance if you are unable to cancel it.

If you have entered an incorrect shipping address, please contact us at kitsch@mykitsch.com as soon as possible. Please note, we work quickly to process and ship your order, and once an order has been shipped we are unable to modify the address.

templates.name: Packing slips on gifts
templates.content: Our packing slips don't have a price on them and the order confirmation is sent to you via email.

templates.name: Are your shampoo and conditioner bars safe for children?
templates.content: Yes, the shampoo and conditioner bars are safe for children. Always review ingredients and consult with a physician for any specific allergy-related questions.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on orders over $35! Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Why did you change the shape of the bars?/ Why aren't they round?
templates.content:
We've updated our shampoo and conditioner bars to an 'S' and a 'C' shape, respectively, to make your shower experience even more effortless. We listened to feedback from our wonderful community and our newly designed bars are intentionally crafted for easy identification, effortless handling, and their ability to deliver thorough cleansing and nourishment to your hair.

The bars are made to fit comfortably in your hand and we hope these new shapes make it easier to identify the right bar, even when you're in a hurry! Additionally, the ridge technology used in these new shapes allows the bars to dry out faster post-use, potentially extending their lifespan.

Rest assured, the new shapes contain the same ingredients you've come to love. It's the same quality, just with a new look designed to enhance your daily routine. We deeply value your feedback and are always striving to improve.

templates.name: How does the soap/shampoo bar dish attach to wall?
templates.content:
Here are the best practices for ensuring a secure attachment of the soap dish:

1. Rinse the suction cups with warm water.
2. Dry the suction cups.
3. Attach the suction cups to the soap dish.
4. Clean and dry the wall. Make sure to use a completely smooth surface.
5. Push the suction cups against the wall by adding pressure for about 10-20 seconds
6. Slowly remove the dish.
7. Press the cups to remove the air bubbles.
8. Slowly re-attach the dish.

You may check the following videos for the instructions.
• How To Prepare the Suction Cups: https://mykitsch.attn.tv/annPcXsOIwwS
• How to Attach Soap Dish to the Wall: https://mykitsch.attn.tv/aexCqzhKJ1XU

Following these steps should help ensure a firm grip and keep your soap dish securely in place.

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: We ship out of California, USA.

templates.name: My refund was approved but it's late/missing
templates.content: If you haven't received a refund yet, first check your bank account again. If the refund is still not issued, then please contact your credit card company, it may take two weeks or more before your refund is officially posted. Finally, contact your bank. There is often some processing time before a refund is posted.

templates.name: When will I receive my refund?
templates.content: Once your return is received and inspected, we will send you an email to notify you that we have received your returned item. We will also notify you of the approval or rejection of your refund.
